_meta.description: Fellowship dungeon scoring + rotation + affix schedule, joined from game files.
_meta.difficulty_axis: shared by all files; curve X='Time' = difficulty level
flags: Affix EFFECT text is the in-game tooltip (DT_ModifierInfo); raw numeric values still live in DungeonModifiers.csv.
Liveness: only modifiers ASSIGNED in DT_ModifersInDungeons are in rotation (see modifier_catalog.assigned).
Stray modifier rows at skipped difficulties are excluded from by_difficulty.
Source casing is inconsistent (schedule 'Stoneskin' vs dict 'StoneSkin'); matched case-insensitively.

Ascension1.effect: Enemies receive 30% Increased Threat from Damage Dealers and Healers.

Ascension2.effect: Enemy's Interruptable abilities and Dispellable effects deal 20% more damage.

Ascension6.effect: Elheryn, the Pathfinder, guides you through the dungeon.

BloodShardVolley.effect: Blood Shards erupt from dying enemies, dealing 2% of their maximum health in damage to all heroes.

MeteorRain.effect: Periodically, burning meteors crash down on heroes, splitting up into fragments that damage and stun on impact.

ColdSnap.effect: Periodically, one hero is afflicted by an icy curse. After 5 seconds the curse erupts, dealing magic damage to all heroes within the radius and rooting them for 3 seconds.

MalevolentSpirits.effect: As heroes kill enemies, eventually a Malevolent Shade will appear, reducing all damage taken by other nearby enemies by 50% and increasing their Haste by 20% until the shade is killed.

EmpoweredMinions.effect: Several enemies in each dungeon are empowered, gaining +100% Health and +150% Power.

StoneSkin.effect: Non-boss enemies have 30% increased Maximum Health

Carnage.effect: All incoming damage applies a bleed for 6% of damage taken on all heroes divided evenly. When a hero's health is above 90% the Carnage bleed is removed.

Challenge.effect: Non-boss enemies deal 10% more damage and have 10% more health.

Ultimatum.effect: Bosses deal 5% more damage and have 10% more health.

PromotedEnemies.effect: Some mobs & bosses have +1 difficulty stats until the dungeon timer runs out.

ShadowLord.effect: The Shadow Lord has intervened, accumulating all kill score. As enemies are killed, Shadow Orbs are spawned nearby that can be collected by heroes.

WinterGiant.effect: Ghorn the Avalanche is waiting for you somewhere in the dungeon. If you challenge him in combat and defeat him, he will assist you.

WinterTrickster.effect: Krumbug the Naughty is waiting for you somewhere in the dungeon. If you challenge him in combat and defeat him, you will gain access to his bag of tricks.

WinterWitch.effect: Eira the White Witch is waiting for you somewhere in the dungeon. If you challenge her in combat and defeat her, she will assist you.

AnomalousOrbs.effect: Three Anomalous Orbs spawn near enemies peridodically. The orbs are targetable and can be damaged.

StormShield.effect: Periodically, players will charge up with red lightning for 8 seconds, afterwhich a massive bolt strikes all players, dealing lethal damage.
